summary: Tested 3 bug fixes for Leads filters: 1) Employee filter switching, 2) Date filter updates stats, 3) All Leads card added. All 3 fixes verified working correctly via backend API tests and frontend UI tests.

minor.issue: Minor count discrepancy: When filtering by employee name 'Sneha Reddy', API returns 37 leads but counting from all leads shows 39. This is due to $or query potentially conflicting with RBAC filter. Does not affect core functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: LeadStats.jsx correctly receives 'leads' array from API (already filtered by date/employee) and calculates stats from it
LeadFilters.jsx handleEmployeeChange correctly converts 'all' to empty string for API compatibility
LeadsPage.jsx passes 'leads' (not 'filteredLeads') to LeadStats, ensuring stats reflect API-filtered data
Backend server.py lines 800-816 correctly handles assigned_to filter with $or for both UUID and name matching
Backend server.py lines 822-833 correctly handles date_from/date_to parameters for date filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified working: 1) Employee filter switching works - tested Sneha Reddy (37 leads) -> Amit Patel (18 leads) -> back to Sneha Reddy (37 leads). 2) Date filter updates stats - Today shows 0 leads, All Time shows 105 leads. 3) All Leads card added with purple styling showing total count. Reset button also works correctly.

1. Employee filter switching.evidence: Switched between Sneha Reddy (37 leads) -> Amit Patel (18 leads) -> Sneha Reddy (37 leads). Data updates correctly each time.

2. Date filter updates stats.evidence: All Time shows 105 leads, Today shows 0 leads. Stats cards update when date filter changes.

3. All Leads card added.evidence: Purple 'All Leads' card visible at start of stat cards showing total count (105).

4. Stats reflect API-filtered data.evidence: When employee filter applied, stats show only that employee's leads. When date filter applied, stats show only leads from that date range.

5. Reset button works.evidence: After clicking Reset, all filters cleared and shows all 105 leads.

screenshots: .screenshots/11_leads_page_stats.png - Initial leads page with All Leads card
